items.claim: Mike Davis has had low activity over the past five and a half years.
items.quote: he hasn't been that active in the past 5 and a half years.

items.claim: Mike Davis had breathing issues during his fight against Ferezam due to freshly painted locker rooms.
items.quote: they had just repainted the locker rooms. Mike Davis said he couldn't breathe.

items.claim: Mike Davis is the best opponent Nurullo Aliev has ever faced by far.
items.quote: he is the best guy Narulo Elv has ever fought by far.
